title: Introducing deepsec: The security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase
summary: Introducing deepsec: The security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase
whyItMatters: Today we’re open sourcing deepsec : a security harness powered by coding agents. It runs on your own infrastructure and surfaces hard-to-find issues in large codebases. You can run deepsec on your laptop without setting up a cloud service for privileged source code access. For inference, you can use your existing Claude or Codex subscription without any add…
